column2: The year is 871. The Danes have torn England apart. Northumbria has fallen. East Anglia has fallen. Only Wessex endures, ruled by Alfred ? an ailing king building a kingdom that can last. To the north, ?lfric governs Bebbanburg with paranoia, knowing the nephew he exiled grew up among vikings. In Durham, Kjartan rules through terror, with Ragnar's daughter chained in his dungeons. In Wessex, Odda the Elder serves his king with absolute loyalty ? while his son drowns in his father's shadow. Uhtred of Bebbanburg has come to Winchester, without a lord and without land, with a sword and a debt to collect. All their fates are bound together now.

column2: A sword forged by Danish hands and carried by a Saxon heart. Serpent-Breath is more than a weapon - it is proof that Uhtred of Bebbanburg exists, that his name is real, and that one day he will take back what is his.
column3: Une epee forgee par des mains danoises et portee par un coeur saxon. Serpent-Breath est plus quune arme - cest la preuve quUhtred de Bebbanburg existe, que son nom est reel, et quun jour il reprendra ce qui lui appartient.
column4: Ein Schwert, geschmiedet von danischen Handen und getragen von einem sachsischen Herzen. Schlangenodem ist mehr als eine Waffe - es ist der Beweis, dass Uhtred von Bebbanburg existiert, dass sein Name real ist.
column5: Una espada forjada por manos danesas y portada por un corazon sajon. Aliento de Serpiente es mas que un arma - es la prueba de que Uhtred de Bebbanburg existe, de que su nombre es real y de que algun dia recuperara lo que es suyo.
